mapper.select:
SELECT a.article_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.collect_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, u.user_id AS author_user_id, u.username AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, c.name AS category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND a.category_id = #{categoryId} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM article_tag at WHERE at.article_id = a.article_id AND at.tag_id = #{tagId}) AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY a.view_count DESC, a.create_time DESC ORDER BY a.like_count DESC, a.create_time DESC ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

SELECT a.article_id, a.title, a.content, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.category_id, a.view_count, a.like_count, a.collect_count, a.comment_count, a.create_time, a.update_time, u.user_id AS author_user_id, u.username AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, c.name AS category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.category_id WHERE a.article_id = #{articleId} AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT t.tag_id AS tagId, t.name, t.color FROM article_tag at JOIN tag t ON at.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId} AND (t.deleted = 0 OR t.deleted IS NULL)

SELECT article_id, user_id, title, content, summary, cover_image, category_id, status, view_count, like_count, collect_count, comment_count, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY article_id DESC
